_comment: Idea Wrangler config. Non-secret settings only — tokens arrive via the sandbox two-phase secret flow (LINEAR_TOKEN, SENTRY_TOKEN, AGENTMAIL_API_KEY). Fill in the PLACEHOLDER values before the first real run; run.sh / emit.mjs fail loudly if the intake address is still a placeholder.

linear._comment: Output destination. Idea Wrangler EMAILS the concept to your Linear team intake address (Settings → Team → Intake → email-to-issue). Subject becomes the issue title, body becomes the description; it lands in that team's Triage. No Linear write-API is used.

sentry._comment: Read-only research source. Set org + the projects worth scanning. Leave projects empty to skip Sentry (the agent degrades gracefully and notes the gap).

agentmail._comment: The sending inbox (the agent's own mailbox). Must match an existing AgentMail inbox; see skills/agent-email.

run._comment: Timebox + harness invocation. timeout_secs caps a single run so a weak idea can't burn a long session. claude_flags runs Claude Code unattended — safe because the container + egress allowlist are the sandbox, and the model has NO send capability. Tune flags to your Claude Code version if needed.
